hiringProcess: Recruiter Screen → Phone Interview → Onsite (4-5 rounds) → Team Match
notes: Apple Hyderabad has a large iOS team. ICT4 base ₹52.7L avg per Levels.fyi Mar 2026. ICT5 base ₹75.6L. RSUs vest over 4 years (25% annually).

hiringProcess: Recruiter Screen → Phone Screen (1-2) → Virtual Onsite (4-5 coding/design) → HC Review
notes: Google L4 Mobile iOS in Delhi: ₹82L TC (₹48L base) per Levels.fyi Apr 2026. L5 Senior can reach ₹1.3Cr+ TC. Gurugram office actively hiring.

hiringProcess: Recruiter Screen → Phone Screen (DSA) → Onsite (3-4 rounds: Coding, System Design, Behavioral)
notes: Uber Hyderabad has a significant mobile team. TC often 1.5-2x of base due to generous RSUs. Strong focus on app architecture.

hiringProcess: HR Screen → HackerRank Assessment → Technical Rounds (2-3) → Hiring Manager → VP Round
notes: GS Hyderabad engineering center is one of the largest outside US. VP-level iOS roles command 55L+ base. Annual bonus can be 20-40% of base.

hiringProcess: Recruiter Screen → Online Assessment → Onsite (4 rounds: Coding, System Design, Design, Behavioral/As-Appropriate)

hiringProcess: OA → Phone Screen → Onsite Loop (4-5 rounds focused on LP + Coding + System Design)

hiringProcess: Application → Technical Screen → Take-home Project → Final Round
